title: Layer 2: Completion gate amend/extend, acceptance checklist, schema cleanup
description: Update completion gate with amend/extend/redirect options, acceptance scenario checklist with pass/fail evidence, intent versioning, and schema cleanup of ghost fields.

in: Define iterations[], revision, intent_version in directive-json.md schema
Rewrite completion gate with amend/extend/redirect options
Acceptance scenario checklist with pass/fail evidence
Add iteration failure cases to failure-handling.md

dod.criterion: directive-json.md defines iterations[], revision, and intent_version fields with types and defaults
Completion gate presents acceptance checklist with pass/fail evidence and four options: approve, amend, extend, redirect
failure-handling.md covers iteration failure cases (amend failure, extend overflow, redirect same-plan)
No orphaned references to old binary reopen flow remain in pipeline docs

tasks.title: Define iterations[], revision, and intent versioning in directive-json.md
tasks.user_scenario: When the pipeline reads directive-json.md, iterations[], revision, and intent_version fields are fully defined — no ghost references remain.
tasks.scope: Add iterations[], revision, intent_version to directive-json.md. Update status lifecycle and On completion section.

dod.criterion: directive-json.md contains iterations[] with typed sub-fields (opened_at, reason, type, items), revision as integer, intent_version as object
Status lifecycle comment updated: awaiting_completion can transition to amend, extend, or redirect
On completion section references iterations[] and revision for reopen scenarios
Grep for iterations, revision, intent_version returns only directive-json.md and 11-completion-gate.md

tasks.title: Rewrite completion gate with amend/extend/redirect and acceptance checklist
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees pass/fail acceptance checklist with evidence, then chooses amend, extend, or redirect instead of binary approve/reopen.
tasks.scope: Rewrite 11-completion-gate.md with four options. Add acceptance checklist section. Define amend/extend/redirect flows with directive.json mutations. Remove old Reject/Reopen Flow.

dod.criterion: Completion gate presents acceptance checklist walking every project's DOD as pass/fail rows with evidence
Four options: approve, amend, extend, redirect — each with description and token budget hint
Each non-approve flow specifies directive.json mutations: iterations[] entry, revision increment, intent_version bump
Amend restarts from execute; extend from plan; redirect from plan with full replanning
Old Reject/Reopen Flow section fully removed

tasks.title: Add iteration failure cases and clean up orphaned references
tasks.user_scenario: When iteration failures occur, failure-handling.md provides clear action steps. No orphaned references to old reopen flow remain.
tasks.scope: Add 4-5 new failure-handling rows for iteration cases. Grep and fix orphaned references to old reopen flow across all pipeline docs.

dod.criterion: failure-handling.md contains 4+ new rows: amend failure, extend overflow, redirect same-plan, amend-too-large escalation
SKILL.md completion gate references updated to approve/amend/extend/redirect
directive-json.md lifecycle and completion sections reflect amend/extend/redirect
Grep for 'reopen' returns zero results describing old binary reopen flow
